summary: Complete testing of auto-matching feature for bank reconciliation. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all features working correctly: suggestions banner, green highlighted rows, Confirmar Sugerencias button, Deseleccionar/Descartar buttons, and tables with link icons.

Backend_sugerencias_endpoint.details: Returns correct matches: 3 suggestions (2 by referencia_exacta with alta confidence, 1 by monto_fecha with media confidence)

Backend_rule1_referencia_exacta.details: Rule 1: exact amount + exact reference produces 'referencia_exacta' with 'alta' confidence. Verified: Deposito cliente ABC (OP-12345) matched PAG-I-2026-00001

Backend_rule2_monto_fecha.details: Rule 2: exact amount + date within ±3 days produces 'monto_fecha' with 'media' confidence. Verified: Transferencia recibida matched PAG-I-2026-00002

Backend_confirmar_sugerencias.details: Endpoint accepts sugerencias array, returns 400 for empty array, ready to persist matches

Backend_movimientos_banco.details: Returns 5 pending bank movements for cuenta_financiera_id=13

Backend_sistema_movimientos.details: Returns 4 pending system movements from cont_movimiento_tesoreria

Frontend_page_loads.details: Conciliación Bancaria page loads with data-testid='conciliacion-page'

Frontend_suggestions_banner.details: Banner shows '3 coincidencias encontradas (3 seleccionadas)' with green background

Frontend_confirmar_sugerencias_button.details: 'Confirmar 3 Sugerencias' button appears in header when suggestions exist (green background)

Frontend_pares_sugeridos_list.details: Shows 3 suggestion rows with checkboxes, dates, descriptions, link icons, amounts, and confidence badges (REF·ALTA, FECHA·MEDIA)

Frontend_green_highlighted_rows.details: 6 green highlighted rows (3 in Banco table, 3 in Sistema table) with link icons instead of checkboxes

Frontend_toggle_buttons.details: 'Deseleccionar todas' and 'Descartar' buttons visible and functional in banner

Frontend_banco_table.details: Table with 5 rows showing date, ref, description, amount. Matched rows have green background and link icon

Frontend_sistema_table.details: Table with 4 rows showing date, numero, tipo (ING/EGR badge), description, amount. Matched rows have green background and link icon

tests_executed.name: Frontend: Bank account selector with BCP Soles Test
Frontend: Confirmar Sugerencias button in header
Frontend: Pares sugeridos list with 3 rows
Frontend: Green highlighted rows in tables

test_credentials: empresa_id=7 (Ambission Industries), cuenta_financiera_id=13 (BCP Soles Test - BCP)
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded: 5 bank movements in cont_banco_mov_raw, 4 system movements in cont_movimiento_tesoreria. Expected matches: 3 (2 by reference, 1 by date)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-matching feature fully functional. Backend: GET /api/conciliacion/sugerencias returns 3 matches with correct rules (referencia_exacta=alta, monto_fecha=media). POST /api/conciliacion/confirmar-sugerencias ready to persist. Frontend: All UI components working - suggestions banner, pares sugeridos list, green highlighted rows with link icons, Confirmar/Deseleccionar/Descartar buttons. Test account: BCP Soles Test - BCP (id=13).
